headline: Will Micron's (MU) Long-Dated Debt Buyback and AI Capex Push Change Its Investment Narrative?
summary: In late March 2026, Micron Technology, Inc. completed cash tender offers for six series of senior notes maturing between 2031 and 2035, with holders tendering the bulk of the outstanding principal and Micron set to pay for accepted notes on April 3, 2026. This move to retire a large portion of long-dated debt comes as Micron is committing very large capital expenditure to expand AI-focused memory capacity, reshaping its balance sheet while funding growth. We’ll now examine how Micron’s...
